purpose.description: What this cache marker is for (e.g., 'code-review').

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC time when the marker was written.

ttl_seconds.description: Optional time-to-live; if set, marker is stale after timestamp + ttl_seconds.

hmac.description: Hex-encoded HMAC-SHA256 over canonical JSON of (purpose, key, data), signed with the per-user secret at ~/.super-model/cache-secret.bin. Tampered or hand-edited markers (HMAC mismatch) are treated as missing on read.
